/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libros2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libros2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/ros2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/ros2_interface/srv/detail/ex_custom_srv__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jaewoo/ros2_ws/build/ros2_interface:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libros2_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
